ownership_contract.implemented: current owner, symbol, and focused tests must resolve in the repository
ownership_contract.missing: current owner and evidence are null or empty; each target has a unique behavior-specific future acceptance contract
ownership_contract.climb_evidence: AF-240 candidate adapters measure inventory readiness only and do not confirm product capability

metric_path_contract: Numeric and boolean paths are extracted from representative source-built result, summary, and analysis schemas; [*] denotes list elements and .* denotes dynamic map keys.
